Information Systems and Technology

Department Chair's Message

MENU

Our time is witnessing one of the fastest periods of change in the digital age. With the rapid development of technologies such as globalization, artificial intelligence, big data, cloud computing, and the Internet of Things (IoT), the importance of the information technology sector is increasing day by day. The rapid rise in the demand for companies undergoing digital transformation and the growing need for IT professionals is further driving the demand for well-trained experts in this field.

Students joining our programme establish a strong foundation in their first years through fundamental courses in computer science and systems management. In the following years, they specialize in areas such as data analytics, information security, software development, and enterprise information systems, thereby preparing themselves for the business world.

According to data from TÜBİSAD (the Association of Turkish Information Technology Industrialists), the global information and communication technology (ICT) market is valued at 32.1 billion dollars. Turkey exports approximately 1.3 billion dollars in ICT products annually, including 898 million dollars in software and 391 million dollars in hardware and services. The information technology domain, continues to grow in areas such as e-commerce, artificial intelligence-based solutions, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and e-government systems, maintains its upward trajectory even during times of crisis.

Our programme aims to cultivate innovative individuals who can adapt to the rapidly changing and evolving information technology sector. With a curriculum aligned with current technological trends, an experienced academic team, and industry collaborations, we aim to prepare our students in the best possible way for the future.

We welcome those wish to be a part of composers of the digital future and build a succesfull career to apply our programme!
